title: Discoveria - More Structures
description: A mod which adds a lot of various structures.
body: Welcome to Discoveria, a Minecraft mod that breathes new life into your world with an abundance of captivating structures waiting to be explored! Traverse through lush landscapes adorned with ancient ruins, majestic fortresses, mystical shrines, and bustling villages bursting with life. Embark on quests to uncover hidden treasures in forgotten dungeons, or take shelter in quaint cottages nestled within sprawling forests. With Discoveria, every corner of your Minecraft world becomes a realm of adventure, filled with stunning architecture and endless possibilities. Some of the structures are: Crypt, Quartz Temple, Fishing Hut, Abandoned Badlands Outpost, Mangrove Shack, Icy Igloo, Older Temple, Sandstone Tower. Images of all listed structures are in the gallery.
